description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn. The exterior walls are dark, likely painted wood or siding, and the roof is a large, low-pitched gable style in a dark gray color. The front facade features a small porch with a brown step and a covered entryway. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the longer sides, each with visible window frames and mullions. The rear side has a set of double doors, possibly leading to a patio or backyard, and there are three large, freestanding panels or signs positioned nearby. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A dark, single-story bungalow with a wide gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a small front porch, set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a small porch and three symmetrically placed windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the roof and the double doors at the rear, with three freestanding panels visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three windows and the back side of the porch, with the panels now on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side window and the three freestanding panels in the foreground.
